Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 69 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. William Blake, Remote by the Sea 68 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 72 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. Researchers find 3,500-year-old loom that reveals textile revolution 93 upvotes, 9 comments
  5. Agents of Chaos 89 upvotes, 10 comments
  6. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 281 upvotes, 54 comments
  7. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. Semantic – Reducing LLM "Agent Loops" by 27.78% via AST Logic Graphs 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  9. Unit: A self-replicating Forth mesh agent running in a browser tab 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  10. Axios Compromised on NPM – Malicious Versions Drop Remote Access Trojan 168 upvotes, 42 comments
  11. Show HN: I turned a sketch into a 3D-print pegboard for my kid with an AI agent 21 upvotes, 2 comments
  12. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 487 upvotes, 154 comments
  13. How to turn anything into a router 625 upvotes, 217 comments
  14. Do your own writing 428 upvotes, 150 comments
  15. Principles and Gear 16 upvotes, 2 comments
  16. Recover Apple Keychain 73 upvotes, 23 comments
  17. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens by 63% 180 upvotes, 71 comments
  18. Seeing Like a Spreadsheet 92 upvotes, 33 comments
  19. Roulette Computers: Hidden Devices That Predict Spins 83 upvotes, 30 comments
  20. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 242 upvotes, 109 comments
  21. Learn Claude Code by doing, not reading 205 upvotes, 94 comments
  22. Incident March 30th, 2026 – Accidental CDN Caching 38 upvotes, 12 comments
  23. Show HN: Coasts – Containerized Hosts for Agents 72 upvotes, 28 comments
  24. Artemis II is not safe to fly 92 upvotes, 38 comments
  25. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 353 upvotes, 188 comments
  26. Bird brains (2023) 304 upvotes, 194 comments
  27. Oscar Reutersvärd (2021) 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. I am definitely missing the pre-AI writing era 299 upvotes, 219 comments
  29. Android Developer Verification 179 upvotes, 163 comments
  30. In math, rigor is vital, but are digitized proofs taking it too far? 110 upvotes, 99 comments
